what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that identifies an attachment (att-5a0674ef) in the dragnet-development channel, typed as board_items, and points to the board item board://item-ea19342b with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content after the frontmatter.
target is a board:// URI referencing item-ea19342b.
standouts: Uses a board:// URI to reference an external board item.
Attachment type board_items signals a link to a project board entry.
File is purely metadata with no payload or explanatory text.
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit UTC offset.
Id prefix att- matches the attachment filename.
concerns: No payload or description explains what the attachment represents.
Target board item is referenced by URI but not resolved in this file.
No author or reason field records why the attachment was created.
notes: A minimal, timestamped ledger stub that links a channel attachment to a board item via URI.
questions: What content or action does board item item-ea19342b represent?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship?
Why was this attachment added to the dragnet-development channel at this time?
Is there a payload or document that should accompany this attachment record?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the file actually functions as a provenance record linking a channel attachment to a board item.
apparent_themes: Cross-reference linking between channels and board items
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, traceable reference from a channel memory attachment to a specific board item, likely for retrieval or context association.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI as the target of an attachment record is a lightweight, scheme-based linking pattern rather than embedding board content.
contribution: It contributes a canonical attachment identifier and a timestamped provenance link between the dragnet-development channel and board item item-ea19342b, which a fused system would retain for traceability and cross-reference resolution.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record in company/channel-memory that identifies att-5a0674ef in dragnet-development as a board_items reference to board://item-ea19342b with an added UTC timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a traceable link from a channel memory attachment to a specific board item for later retrieval or context association.
